What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: A large group of people wearing white pants and shirts stand in a semi-circle formation surrounding a central open space. Two individuals engage in dynamic physical movements within the center while others watch or clap. Several participants hold tall wooden musical instruments near the back wall where a large blue and white banner hangs. The room features a high ceiling with exposed wooden beams and fluorescent lights.

question: Describe the arrangement and actions of the group members.
canonical_answer: At 6s, people wearing white pants arrange in a semi-circle; at 8s, several individuals are clapping their hands together; at 10s, a person seated on a chair plays a tall drum; at 12s, the group maintains formation under fluorescent lights.

question: What will the two individuals in the center do next? A. Continue performing capoeira movements in the circle. B. Stop and leave the circle immediately. C. Sit on the wooden chair to rest. D. Begin playing the tall musical instruments.
